source_pr.title: statistics: fix the fomula for checking outdated stats
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #26282 

### What is changed and how it works?

Currently, we use `(modify count/realtime row count)` to check if the stats are outdated. But the reasonable method to calculate the ratio should be `(modify count/row count when last analyze)`.
